summary: Completed testing of 360° Member Profile features. Backend: 28/28 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Fixed critical bug where 'orders is not defined' error crashed member profile. All new features verified working.
seed_data_creation: Test notes created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 360° Member Profile features fully functional. Event Stream panel opens from Command Center header. Member Directory has new tabs: Health Vault, Orders, Paw Rewards. Auto-ticket creation hooks are in place for orders, pet additions, Pet Soul updates, and membership purchases.

event_stream_endpoint.description: /api/concierge/event-stream returns recent events from tickets, orders, memberships
event_stream_endpoint.evidence: Returns events array with type, event_type, pillar, title, timestamp fields

full_member_profile_endpoint.evidence: Returns member, pets, membership, paw_rewards, tickets (by_pillar, by_pet), orders, bookings, memories, activity, notes, stats

member_notes_crud.description: Create, Read, Delete operations for member notes
member_notes_crud.evidence: POST /api/concierge/member/{email}/notes creates note, GET returns notes, DELETE removes note

health_vault_endpoint.description: /api/concierge/member/{email}/health-vault returns health data for all pets
health_vault_endpoint.evidence: Returns health_vault array with pet_id, pet_name, records, vaccines, weights, medications, vet_visits

frontend_event_stream_panel.description: Event Stream panel opens from Command Center header
frontend_event_stream_panel.evidence: Screenshot shows Live Event Stream panel with shop events, auto-created tickets

frontend_member_directory_tabs.description: Member Directory has new tabs: Health Vault, Orders, Paw Rewards
frontend_member_directory_tabs.evidence: Screenshot shows all tabs: Account, Membership, Pets & Soul, Health Vault, Tickets, Orders, Paw Rewards, Memories, Activity, Notes

auto_ticket_creation_orders.description: Auto-ticket creation triggers on order placement
auto_ticket_creation_orders.evidence: ticket_auto_creation.py on_order_placed() creates ORD-TKT tickets in service_desk_tickets

auto_ticket_creation_pet_soul.description: Auto-ticket creation triggers on Pet Soul update
auto_ticket_creation_pet_soul.evidence: pet_soul_routes.py calls on_pet_soul_updated() which creates SOUL-TKT tickets

auto_ticket_creation_membership.description: Auto-ticket creation triggers on membership purchase
auto_ticket_creation_membership.evidence: membership_routes.py calls on_membership_event('purchased') which creates MEM-TKT tickets

auto_ticket_creation_pet_addition.description: Auto-ticket creation triggers on pet addition
auto_ticket_creation_pet_addition.evidence: server.py calls on_pet_added() which creates PET-TKT tickets

bug_fix_applied.issue: ReferenceError: orders is not defined in MemberProfileConsole
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: The 'orders' state variable was not defined in MemberProfileConsole component, but was being used in the Orders tab
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added useState for orders, added useEffect to fetch orders when Orders tab is selected, updated fetchMemberDetails to use concierge full-profile endpoint which returns orders data

mocked_apis.whatsapp: Uses click-to-chat links (wa.me) - no Business API integration
